title: Sakura SS5411 Squeegee Ice Scraper
features: Perfect for scraping ice, cleaning window and clearing snow.
Soft rubber blade for clearing water, plastic head for removing ice and snow and foam to dry and/or clean your windows
Item Package Dimension: 5.8cm L x 13.6cm W x 17.0cm H
description: The 3 in 1 ICE scraper is an essential piece of kit for all cars. Perfect for scraping ice, cleaning window and clearing snow. This simple little tool uses the soft rubber blade for clearing water, The plastic head for removing ice and snow and the foam to dry and/or clean your windows.
